style: <style>html{background:url('https://api.paugram.com/wallpaper/?source=gt') no-repeat center center fixed;background-size:cover}body{background:rgba(253,248,243,.85)!important;border-radius:12px!important;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(196,122,90,.15)!important;backdrop-filter:blur(12px)!important;-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(12px)!important}body{animation:_gfade .65s ease-out;scroll-behavior:smooth}@keyframes _gfade{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}.Box-row{transition:transform .25s ease,box-shadow .25s ease,background .25s ease!important;border-radius:8px!important}.Box-row:hover{transform:translateX(6px)!important;background:rgba(196,122,90,.08)!important;box-shadow:0 3px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.13)!important}.Label{transition:transform .18s ease,box-shadow .18s ease!important;cursor:pointer!important}.Label:hover{transform:scale(1.1)!important;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.22)!important}.btn{transition:transform .2s ease,box-shadow .2s ease!important}.btn:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)!important;box-shadow:0 5px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.16)!important}::-webkit-scrollbar{width:5px}::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#e8b4b8,#c47a5a);border-radius:3px}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#d4a0a4,#b8694e)}.postTitle{animation:_gslide .5s ease-out}@keyframes _gslide{from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-12px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0)}}img[src*='avatars.githubusercontent']{animation:_gfloat 3.5s ease-in-out infinite!important}@keyframes _gfloat{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-6px)}}.markdown-body img{transition:transform .3s ease,box-shadow .3s ease!important;border-radius:8px!important}.markdown-body img:hover{transform:scale(1.025)!important;box-shadow:0 10px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.22)!important}#waifu{position:fixed!important;left:0!important;right:auto!important;bottom:0!important;z-index:99999!important}</style>
indexStyle: <style>body{animation:_gfade .65s ease-out;scroll-behavior:smooth}@keyframes _gfade{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}html{background:url('https://www.dmoe.cc/random.php') no-repeat center center fixed;background-size:cover}body{background:rgba(253,248,243,.85)!important;border-radius:12px!important;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(196,122,90,.15)!important;backdrop-filter:blur(12px)!important;-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(12px)!important}.SideNav{background:rgba(253,248,243,.6)!important;border-radius:10px!important;min-width:unset}.SideNav-item{transition:all .3s ease!important;border-radius:8px!important}.SideNav-item:hover{background-color:rgba(196,122,90,.1)!important;border-radius:8px!important;transform:translateX(6px) scale(1.01)!important;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(196,122,90,.12)!important}.SideNav-item:nth-child(1){animation:_gslide .4s ease-out .05s both}.SideNav-item:nth-child(2){animation:_gslide .4s ease-out .1s both}.SideNav-item:nth-child(3){animation:_gslide .4s ease-out .15s both}.SideNav-item:nth-child(4){animation:_gslide .4s ease-out .2s both}.SideNav-item:nth-child(5){animation:_gslide .4s ease-out .25s both}.SideNav-item:nth-child(6){animation:_gslide .4s ease-out .3s both}.SideNav-item:nth-child(7){animation:_gslide .4s ease-out .35s both}.SideNav-item:nth-child(8){animation:_gslide .4s ease-out .4s both}.SideNav-item:nth-child(9){animation:_gslide .4s ease-out .45s both}.SideNav-item:nth-child(10){animation:_gslide .4s ease-out .5s both}@keyframes _gslide{from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-20px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0)}}.Label{transition:transform .18s ease,box-shadow .18s ease!important;cursor:pointer!important}.Label:hover{transform:scale(1.1)!important;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.22)!important}.btn{transition:transform .2s ease,box-shadow .2s ease!important}.btn:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)!important;box-shadow:0 5px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.16)!important}::-webkit-scrollbar{width:5px}::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#e8b4b8,#c47a5a);border-radius:3px}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#d4a0a4,#b8694e)}.avatar{transition:.8s!important}.avatar:hover{transform:scale(1.15) rotate(360deg)!important}img[src*='avatars.githubusercontent']{animation:_gfloat 3.5s ease-in-out infinite!important}@keyframes _gfloat{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-6px)}}.pagination a:hover,.pagination span:hover,.pagination em:hover{border-color:#c47a5a!important;transform:translateY(-2px)!important}#waifu{position:fixed!important;left:0!important;right:auto!important;bottom:0!important;z-index:99999!important}</style>
title: 失有米子の部屋
subTitle: と纱久良雪希
